reviews.review_description: This is one of best puzzle games I have ever played. Everything was amazingly made, especially the hint system with Winston. I was so bummed when I finally finished my playthrough, I have replayed it 3 times already. I hope they come out with another mission so we can get revenge for Winston. BEST PUZZLE GAME EVER

developer_response.body: Three playthroughs?? Okay, that  made our day! Noted though — we're definitely thinking about what comes next. Thanks for sticking with the game this long.

reviews.review_description:
I love this game! Time has absolutely gotten away from me playing this thing. The game is quite vast and has tons of puzzles and challenges. Some of them are pretty difficult. Had to get some hints in the first scene, but once I did that, I understood how the game hides hints a little better. Haven't needed hints since, but the objectives don't always come easy.

The environment and game play are interesting and fun. Being someone with a full woodshop, a welding station, and my own lift for working on my car in my garage, this game is right up my alley. I haven't even finished it yet. It's a pretty long game. Worth every penny.

This game is like no other, it’s like you took the IEYTD series, mixed it with budget cuts, gave it the lore level of iron man vr, gave it the graphics of retropolis mixed with blade and sorcery, gave it job simulator level whimsy whilst keeping a waltz of the wizard-esque tone, AND gave it the greatest cliffhanger in all of virtual reality… I’m sorry no disrespect to schell games but even if IEYTD 4-10 were to come out all on the same day, this game would still win. This is the greatest VR game of all time without question, and if it does become a series oh it’s gonna be the best franchise in fiction EVER. I LOVE THIS GAME

developer_response.body: Okay, We need to print this review out and hang it on the wall. That list of comparisons is absurdly flattering — IEYTD, Budget Cuts, and Iron Man VR in one breath?  😉 Thank you, seriously.

reviews.review_description: I'm only on Chapter 2, and I am very impressed! The puzzles make you really put on your thinking cap. I avoid using the hints now like I did at first because I learned that all the clues are there.  Just stop, think, and look around carefully.  The developers did a great job with the game play, physics, fun factor, and story. I also find it very relaxing because so far, there is no time urgency. Maybe there will be, and that's OK. I really hope there will be more games made from this developer.  I do have one question that maybe the developer can help me with.  How do I get my height level to the sweet spot? I am too high up in seated mode.  I've tried accessibility settings and my boundary settings, but maybe I'm doing that wrong?

I just finished Fixer Undercover and thoroughly enjoyed it. It has a good story and fun characters, even Winston, despite his ongoing personal-space issues.

I spent quite a while playing because I like to poke around and interact with everything I can find, and this game accommodates that very well. Despite my wandering, the narrative flowed smoothly, and the puzzles were both creative and solvable. The hint system is interesting; I often had to click through several levels of hints because I was already farther along than where they started. That wasn’t a problem; it mostly reassured me that I was on the right track.

I was impressed by the variety of locations and by how much larger the game turned out to be than I expected. Every time I thought I might be nearing the end, there was another area to explore. The save system is excellent, making it easy to stop and return later without losing my place. As others have mentioned, there are some issues with the tools getting in the way of grabbing items, and some problems manipulating the “two handed” objects, but nothing earth shattering. Generally I enjoyed the graphics and physics of the game.  

I’m not speedy, so I ended up spending about ten hours with it. For me, that made it a good value. I hope the ending was hinting at a sequel. 

I also like to mention, for context, that I’m 66 years old and probably not a typical gamer. Take that into account however you wish, but from my perspective, this was a thoroughly enjoyable experience. Thanks to the development team.

This game made me feel like james bond great job 
add on: i really think you should more missions and add costumisation like outfits for winston and different colours and patterns on gloves and tools and also skins for the radio.
maybe add more ineraction with the phone and maybe use it in a mission and also great job on the puzzles it blew away with creativity

Absolutely love it!  Janky at times but that makes it more vrealistic.  Some jank is welcome when you have a game like this.  Pure fun!  If you enjoy escape room style puzzle games this is for you.  One of the better ones I have played.  Winston is a cool little sidekick and can give you hints if you are totally stumped but for the most part the puzzles have been logical enough that I have been able to figure them out myself.  Great job Dev's 👏

reviews.review_title: Clever and fun escape the room game
reviews.review_description:
Man, I got this game from a giveaway on a FB group that I belong. I had a good expectations of this game but those expectations were surpassed in a far and clean way.
Great graphics, great dialogues (although I feel the actors could sound more convincing sometimes) and clever puzzles.
I haven't finish the game but so far, I've been enjoying this every step and every invested minute.
Totally recommended. You won't be disappointed.

I was a little skeptical at first because I'd have never played a puzzle game like this and then I got into the missions. It was the best! The last little bit of dialogue with Winston and then the phone call tells me you're making another game and if it is good as that one I will pay every penny for it. Good job to everyone who helped make the game and can't wait from what your team makes next.

developer_response.body: Thanks for such a kind words! It is good to hear you liked experience!

reviews.review_description:
A very well-made escape room-style game with a story and plenty of laughs.


Trusted with your dependable range of tradesmen's tools, you will be scratching your heads as you work through a mixture of logic- and physics-based puzzles.


There's a lengthy 7-chapter (8-10hrs for most people) campaign for you to work through as you delve into the mystery of what's truly happening at Redemption Prison. 


Highly recommended for anyone that's a fan of puzzles and looking for a story-driven campaign.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the recommendation! 🙏

reviews.review_description: I like it kinda like I expect you to die but your character isn't lazy, YOU CAN WALK AROUND ikr anyway it's a good puzzle game the hint system doesn't just give you the answer and can't wait for a second game (hopefully) oh and Winston is peak
Great game sadly you can only play three times over because you can’t delete saves but I love it anyways amazing puzzles, and I felt amazing at the end. Love the story ￼￼

...of a woman and her power tools! A refreshing take on the escape room genre, navigating the puzzles with a whole array of tools that sometimes have to be used creatively. My favorite things are that there are no time limits (I do very poorly with those), despite the prison announcements sounding like they're right on your tail, and that the hint system mostly points you in the right direction without coming out and giving the answer (I'm proud to say most of the time I didn't need it. I like games that make me feel smart! But never fear, there is still plenty of challenge here.) Some negatives are the grabbing can be a little janky, especially if something is on the floor (tool belt keeps getting in the way) and there are one or two math-based puzzles that gave me a headache (I hate math!) Otherwise this is a very enjoyable puzzler

Update:  Well, I've finished the game (which in itself is a recommendation.. I have a large backlog of abandoned games). Not sure if the grabbing issue was fixed, but the dev's responsiveness earned the last star. Be sure and watch until the end of the credits too!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the review!!

We also appreciate the feedback regarding the grabbing mechanics and math puzzles—it helps us keep improving the experience and in the last Patch we improved it. Congratulations on finishing the game!

reviews.review_description:
Impressed with what I've played so far. 
I appreciate the dialogue, atmosphere, physics, graphics, music, and the hint system. I was worried I might be stuck too long, or feel lost, but with Winston and his hints, I was never lost for long. This hint system is just perfect for a puzzle adventure game, and I wish other games implemented a similar system to this one! I can tell a lot of work went into this title, as I had mostly a seamless experience here in Chapter 1.  The only issue I had was climbing the ladder for some reason.  Hoping this can get resolved with a patch at launch. 
(That VR Girl on YouTube if you want to see some gameplay)

developer_response.body: Winston is beaming with pride! As for the ladder – we've already sent a repair crew. Ironic that in a game about fixing things... the ladder needs fixing. Patch incoming! Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
Wasn't sure about this game at the start, but 15mins in got the hang of how to do things, and it just got better and better. It's a brilliant game and lots of fun to play .hope they bring a new one out some time. Give it a go i don't think you will be disappointed. Thank you so much for this game 💙.
Took about 9hr to complete

I love this game, NOT a waste of money, but it's to short. I really like how satisfying solving each puzzle was, But I had a few glitches. In the bit where you need to start the engine, if  you pull the switch back down instead of letting it spring back, the motor start up sound doesn't stop. There were no other glitches,and the hints system is really good.😁😀😃🙂 But please make the game longer. 😿ಠ⁠︵⁠ಠ(⁠ ⁠╹⁠▽⁠╹⁠ ⁠)

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the detailed feedback — and especially for the bug report on the engine switch! We'll take a look at it in the next few days. Really glad the hint system with Winston worked for you!

reviews.review_description:
I just took my, initial, 5 star rating, and changed it to the appropriate 1 star. Game had high potential  it was everything I love in a game.  Then the glitches started. Im so mad at this game. There are 7 chapters; 1-6 the pros dominated the cons (needs better teleport movement, it simply didn't work 20-25% of the time).

There is was enjoying the game, all the way to chapter 7. The best and most accurate way to put it: game breaks down and leaves you stuck. 

Come on developers of this, if your going F#*& it up, can you please do it in chapter 1?? It's only amplified by having invited myself in chapters 1-6.

Fixer Undercover is a brilliant escape-style adventure in the spirit of I Expect You to Die, but with free movement and a progressing storyline that adds even more depth.

You play as a spy infiltrating a prison to arrest its director—only to uncover deeper secrets along the way. The mission design is clever, varied, and constantly engaging. What really stands out are the hands-on mechanics: drilling, grinding, cutting… everything feels tactile and satisfying in VR.

The game is colorful, full of personality, and your assistant Winston adds charm and humor throughout the experience. It balances puzzle-solving, action, and storytelling very well.

Creative, polished, and genuinely fun—this one is highly recommended. 🕶️✨

developer_response.body: I Expect You to Die" has million-dollar gadgets. We have a grinder and apples. Budget is budget. Thank you for the beautiful words!

reviews.review_title: The escape game we are looking for
reviews.review_description:
The studio Creativity AR has delivered a real gem. This small Polish team has been running real-life escape rooms for over 10 years. When the Quest 2 came out, they saw it as the perfect opportunity to bring their childhood dreams to life in VR — and they poured their heart and soul into it. Learning about their journey really puts things into perspective: the hard work, the struggles, and every milestone a studio goes through to ship a game.

The result speaks for itself — a solid 4.8/5 on the store, and the game genuinely delivers!

In Fixer Undercover, you go on an undercover infiltration mission inside a prison to foil the warden's plans. Over 6 to 8 hours of gameplay, you'll be accompanied by Winston, your trusty drone sidekick with a razor-sharp sense of humor. Progress requires a hands-on approach — you'll be equipped with a screwdriver, grinder, pliers, hammer, and more.

Expect to bust through walls, fix pipes, repair motors and electrical systems, outsmart camera networks, grind and unscrew hatches, cut the right wires, crack codes through mini-games, and cleverly use your environment to your advantage. Every object has physics, and there's something deeply satisfying about trying to hook keys with a broom or flipping every item in the room looking for clues. Search every trash can, lift every pillow, and leave no detail unchecked!

The progression feels great and rewarding — and one of the game's biggest strengths is that you'll never feel stuck. Winston is always there to drop a hint when you need it, which shows a genuine respect for the player. Fixer Undercover is never frustrating — it's fun, challenging, and satisfying throughout.

Between missions, Winston gives you a well-deserved breather by cooking up a meal in full butler mode.

Great visuals, fun gameplay, totally engaging!

UPDATE :
Thanks to the amazing help from the developers the problem has been fixed and I’m eternally grateful!

I have played the game through and enjoyed it so much I let my grandson have a go! He got to the first cell and couldn’t do anything on the right hand wall. Couldn’t open the cupboard or unscrew the drawer handle or tear down a poster! The hands just wouldn’t reach the wall. Since then I’ve reinstalled it 3 times and still have the same problem! I’m really hoping this is a bug and the devs can help me!

What a well thought out game. Absolutely love this. Caught it on sale didn't expect much and have been pleasantly surprised. Just giddy with happiness I look forward to playing whenever I can. As an Undercover maintenance man I feel like I'm the star of a movie. This game just keeps on giving.  It's so good that it most certainly needs a sequel...give it 5 stars if you agree.
Great game hope they bring number 2 out soon.

This is one of the best VR games I have ever played though. I wish there was more in the game because I finished it within. I think four hours over two days but other than it being pretty short it was perfect game. It is worth the price I’d recommend it to everyone who wants a good escape room VR game. I hope this review helps you. 
￼

Wow what a game 
This game was fantastic 10/10 to the inventers absolutely brilliant  i enjoyed start to finish and it goes on forever highly recommended.
Good puzzle like how you can use tools and good chapter and other stuff

reviews.review_title: These News Recipes Are Pretty Good
reviews.review_description:
Winston, you've outdone yourself on this one. That croissant was amazing. Also, what type of roast was that coffee? I can't believe you found all of these on the newspapers. If I wasn't Agent 404, I think we'd have to open up a pizzeria. Gosh, that would be an amazing idea. We just have to figure out the dark side of this program...

          The devs sure outdid themselves on this game. However, I think this recipe was a little too complex for the newspaper. The game was fun, interesting, and it got your brain thinking. You can truly tell it was made by former escape room designers. I would 100% recommend getting this game. I'd also recommend joining the community. The devs are so nice over there.

Thank you to Creativity AR for allowing me to access Fixer: Undercover early for playtesting.

developer_response.body: Winston says the croissant is his signature recipe, and he personally roasts the coffee with his drone exhaust. Fixer's Pizzeria? Sounds like a bussines plan :D  Thanks for the support and for being part of the community! 🍕

reviews.review_description: As a slightly older VR enthusiast who has actually used the types of hand tools available to you in this game, I appreciated the simple and straightforward approach this game has to the gameplay and puzzles you need to solve to progress.  I had to use the hint system on the very first level a few times but once you understand how things work and interact, you probably won't need them.  Nice to know they are there though as I did need a nudge in chapter 6.  Other reviewers have mentioned a little "jank" in some of the object interactions and I will confirm.  Angling a broom between two jail cell bars to reach a key was a little difficult as it seemed to float from time to time in your hands.  Other times while moving around a room I might unintentionally drag a plant or chair with me for a moment only because I got too close to it and the developer made it so I COULD interact with that object if I wanted to. It did not in any way detract from the fun at all, just something the developer might address with a future update.  Others have compared this favorably to the IEYTD franchise and I agree completely and hope to see the Fixer and Winston come back soon for more spy adventures.

developer_response.body: We appreciate the detailed feedback! We have noted the observations regarding object interactions – it can indeed be a trade-off when combining physics with many interactions in VR, but we're looking into improvements. We also hope to bring Fixer and Winston back for more missions in the future!

reviews.review_description: As many others have stated, this remarkable game invokes everything that makes the 'I Expect You To Die' games so popular, but then adds all it's own humor, crazy clever collection of terrific puzzles, with a brilliantly implemented hint system, that never outright gives you the solution. The graphics are astounding for this type of game, the mechanics all work perfectly, aside from a couple of minor jitters (due probably to me also recording in-headset), then game ran as smooth as silk. The humor is cheeky, cheerful and at times hilarious, all delivered in a tongue-in-cheek deadpan style... I would easily recommend this game to anyone, such a breath of fresh air in an increasingly stagnant market, I really hope this game is a huge success, as I already want to play Fixer Undercover 2.

So i just finished the game and a love the puzzles. Some had me stumped for a little bit. The graphics are pretty good. And the music is fun, i like how you can just turn the radio down if you get tired of the music However all is not great. Any time you have to reach with a pipe or broom or what ever the item you are reaching with glitches. I found sometimes i would get stuck in a wall. Other than that i really liked the game. Good suprise at end. I hope this game does well enough to warrant a sequel.

developer_response.body: We're thrilled with your review — thank you! A patch is dropping today or tomorrow that will 'sweep' those broom and pipe glitches aside, and we're also tackling the wall clipping issues. Great feedback like yours helps us make the game better for everyone. And hey — if you ever feel like those fixes earned us that last missing star, we certainly wouldn't complain 😉

reviews.review_description: this might be one of the best ever kind of i expect you to die games i've ever played i mean it's not expect you to die it's honestly might be way better than that honestly i was so immersed because the clues were really hard and i felt like i was a natural cia to agent in a prison this might be one of the best games that i've ever played to the devs that made this game you are great people and please make a part two

Not my usual kind of game, but it's a solid physical puzzler that never seems to leave the player stumped as long as they can reason things out. Fun characters and cozy setting makes it extra approachable for people who might not enjoy stress and violence.

developer_response.body: Thank you! We're glad you had a great time. For an indie studio working on its first title, every review makes a huge difference. Thanks for the feedback!

reviews.review_description: Good game so far and absolutely praise the hint system , its perfect as most developers leave u clueless with no hints or directions which just causes frustration on escape room puzzle games. Great job now i can continue playing without worry about quitting a game for good stuck on a puzzle. Gives me more confidence not to use the hint system till I've tried everything first.

Ok so I love this game however some interactions dont work worth a crap. In one area you have to use a long pole to grab something, my kid gave up here which is why I decided to play this and after I got there I see why he did. Later you have to use a broom handle much the same way but that works good so why the stupid garbage pole? Lol closer to the end you've got to collect coal which again works like hot trash. Also the thing that uses the coal also uses wood and I closed the door then couldn't reopen it to add wood. Then the dialog for when that part is finished popped before I did anything and replayed when I did finished that part lol. Also the elevator in that areas doors again work like garbage. Also crashed out the fame twice while playing. So its a great game but very buggy

developer_response.body: Appreciate the honesty! Knowing we’re a "5-star game with some bugs" keeps us motivated. We're fine-tuning the physics and fixing those triggers as we speak. Maybe once the patch drops, we can convince you to officialize that 5-star rating? 😄

reviews.review_description: good jod

developer_response.body: Good jod back at you! thanks for playing!

reviews.review_title: Devs please read I love this game
reviews.review_description: This is the best a vr game can get. Please make another game where the character we play as does another mission but with the normal gadgets. Please and I love this game it’s awesome

This game was amazing. Played the trial and immediately bought it. The puzzles were challenging but not over the top, the aesthics were good, and the story and writing was fantastic and funny. I also liked the music which seemed to changed based on the situation so it made the whole game engaging. I hope the devs make another one because they did real good with this one.

Wow did I enjoy this game! Puzzles make you think but not overwhelmingly difficult. The graphics are really nice and the robot companion is funny and helpful!  I wish there were more levels because I was truly sad when it ended. Great job on this game! Thanks devs!!

So good I really hope this becomes a franchise for VR and I really hope the second one comes out soon I don't want to wait to find out the rest of the story 
Really great game one of the best i have ever played 
Thank you devs please make more of Fixer

One thing though, you should make it softlock proof, it mostly is but I spent quite a few minites searching for the handle, that got under the ladder’s base.
All in all very good game!!

developer_response.body: That ladder again...  Fixer is already on his way with a wrench. Thanks for the patience and the 5 stars!

reviews.review_title: A fun and unique puzzle game!
reviews.review_description: A fun and creative puzzle game with actually a great story narrative. Not to mention the least a funny sidekick Winston that keeps you company with great music on a radio while you break out of a prison only tools! Graphics are great as well.

developer_response.body: Really appreciate the review! Winston and his radio are a big part of the experience, so we're happy that connection came through. Thanks for the support – we'll keep pushing to earn that 5th star!

reviews.review_description:
A great story-driven escape room puzzle game.

Interesting puzzles, the use of tools, and well-written lines from our assistant Winston... Plus, the object physics. I'm thrilled.
5 stars

developer_response.body: Thanks so much! Puzzles, tools, physics, and Winston – those are the four pillars we built this game on, so it means a lot that all of them landed for you.

reviews.review_description:
Just simply stunning, from the moment you get into this game, you can see how much love has been put into this game, The graphics are just incredible, what the Quest 3 deserves finally, I stood and just looked around for a good 5 minutes.
This is a complete game, no jank, no bugs, it plays  like a dream.
Loving the story, I’m fully invested in this game already, undoubtedly one of the best titles of 2026.
Bravo to Creativity AR.
STUNNING AND BRILLIANT.

developer_response.body: I stood and just looked around for a good 5 minutes" – that's the most beautiful compliment a Quest 3 game can get. STUNNING AND BRILLIANT – right back at you!

reviews.review_title: Amazing game but if you get stuck…..
reviews.review_description:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

If you have ever wanted to feel like a smooth-talking spy, a back-alley problem solver, and the person who somehow knows a guy who knows a guy… Fixer Undercover absolutely nails that fantasy. The game drops you right into the role of a fixer navigating shady deals, funny conversations, and situations that feel like they could spiral out of control at any moment. In VR it’s especially immersive, because you’re not just watching the drama unfold, you’re standing right in the middle of it trying to keep your cool while making decisions. It’s the kind of game where you start thinking, “I’ll just play one mission,” and suddenly it’s much later than planned and you’re still negotiating like a digital crime-drama professional.

What really stands out is how natural the interactions feel. The environments pull you in, the characters feel alive, and the tension during conversations is surprisingly real. It creates that perfect blend of storytelling and immersion that VR does best.

Also, fair warning: this game will make you feel way cooler than you probably are in real life. After playing, I caught myself walking around my house like I had a secret meeting scheduled and three burner phones in my pocket. Highly recommended if you enjoy narrative-driven VR experiences and want to step into a world of undercover deals, clever conversations, and just enough chaos to keep things interesting. 

If you get stuck, check out my walkthrough video playlist on YouTube @misschiefvr.
Really fun game. Very well made! It's a good length without being too long, fun from the start and varied. Nice graphics, mechanics are intuitive. Very glad I played it.
So I try to play it and really enjoy it but then sadly the game is lagging and now it is disappointing 😔

developer_response.body: We’re genuinely sorry to hear that performance issues are impacting your experience. Please be assured that the game has undergone rigorous optimization and testing across all major headsets, where it maintained stable performance, so these reports of lag are quite unexpected. If you could join our Discord to provide more details about your setup. We are committed to investigating this further and getting you back to a smooth gameplay experience as quickly as possible: discord.gg/HDSQAnhYGU

reviews.review_description: I've found my new nightly Achievement Hunt on Quest! From your witty companion to the unique concept, Fixer delivers a unique experience that will keep you coming back for more. The puzzles are the perfect difficulty. Looking forward to my time with this one!

developer_response.body: Thank you! Winston is incredibly proud someone appreciates his company. Have fun playing this one!

reviews.review_description: I'm having so much fun playing this game!  I'm glad there are tips you can get for when your stumped.

Excellent game that puts you at the centre of a prison conspiracy. Embody a spy as you go undercover to discover the nefarious plot taking place inside the prison. 

Using standard tools and your brain, you'll solve the puzzles in front of you to make your way across seven levels. 

Read the full review at dialognews dot ca

I find this game challenging and enjoyable. Good story and good idea, more my pace than 'I expect you to die' 

Even though some of the puzzles do not make sense even after I solved them I can't understand what it was about!?!

They have a seated option which doesn't do much, you have a height adjustment and that moves about a millimeter.. 

 I would also point out I thought I would have to refund this game as I got stuck in a room where I needed to lift a door from the bottom, no matter my settings or boundaries adjustment I COULDN'T get to it because the door was below my flooring.. Many frustrating attempts later and trying to set my floor level to the sofa surface I still couldn't reach the bottom of the door because the game doesn't adjust accordingly. 

 Anyway  I couldn't get through the ventilation shafts 🤦🏻‍♀️I can teleport in but I spawn way above the map and now I'm stuck... All because of this terrible height /floor bug I'm experiencing.. I had to repeatedly start the chapters over again and keep restarting the game because of these bugs.
The office.. The fuses.. One fuse just disappeared into the wall so I had to start that over again..

Countless times I've had bugs I don't know why but the floor level is way off constantly.

Got to final chapter and I need to pick up either a plank or pallet.. Guess what?? Can't do it, the hand tracking doesn't realise I'm trying to grab it so no blue line where you can grab stuff from a small distance... and I'd have to be through my floor to get the vr hands on it. 

This has made it a stressful, frustrating experience tbh.. Didn't bother trying again.. Uninstalled it

developer_response.body:
Thank you for praising our story and concept! We are really sorry for the frustrating bugs you experienced.

Regarding the floor level bug – it only appeared once during our 3 years of development, which made it extremely difficult to identify and track down! We have recently released patches that fix the disappearing fuses and grabbing mechanics in the final chapter. As for the floor height issue, a fresh reinstall of the updated game should definitely fix it for you.

We completely understand your frustration, but we’d be honored if you decided to reinstall and give it one more try to see the ending!

reviews.review_description: Perfect price point for a great escape room experience. If you like games like The Room, Red Matter, Ghost Town, House of DaVinci, etc. you’ll love this. Graphics and voice work aren’t quite on par with the others (some seriously blurry textures in some parts), but gameplay and mechanics are top notch

developer_response.body: Thank you! We're glad you enjoy the gameplay and mechanics – that's where we put a lot of our focus. As for the textures, we hear you and we're actively working on visual improvements. Appreciate the honest feedback!

reviews.review_description: Having problems with this game. Stuck at 2 different levels. Tried unloading then reinstalling but still has bugs. Tried to find Discord site to respond to your email but unable to find it. Reddit keeps appearing is this how to contact you?

developer_response.body:
We're sorry to hear you're stuck! We really want to help you get past these levels and fix the issues you're experiencing.

Please reach out to us directly on our Discord server so we can investigate these bugs and assist you: https://discord.gg/HDSQAnhYGU or our social media or email help@creativityar.com

reviews.review_title: Great puzzles and visuals, also jank.
reviews.review_description:
I'm a sucker for a whimsical escape game, and this is a very good one. Puzzles range from those which are simple but satisfying due to the tactile inputs, and a couple that feel obtuse. But hints are always there, and I think I only used them once. The visuals and setting are really well realised, and the world has the personality to expand into a franchise.

But the polished visuals do come up against the janky controls in places, and stop a good game being great. Climbing ladders can be torturous, wielding two-handed items is a physics nightmare at times, and a couple of puzzle glitches meant I had to restart chapters. 

That said, I don't hestitate to recommend the game, especially to fans of IEYTD as many have said before. It's a good length, and very good value for money.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your honest review. We are trying to improve the physics,the climbing ladders and other stuff in the next patch to achieve the fluent experience

reviews.review_description:
Breaking in is a nice twist, but the fact that you don't have to manage an inventory screen because you're equipped with almost everything you need from the start is brilliant! Adjusting the radio to change the music or turn it off is the chef's kiss without a menu.

I play a lot of escape puzzles on Meta horizon. Unlike them, this makes great use of VR space. There are puzzles in here you will never find anywhere else. However the ability to grab and climb things is sometimes disorienting because I can't see my hands after I've grabbed a thing, the game seems disoriented as well causing me to be in positions I never intended. It's a minor flaw in the overall experience but still earns the -1* because it could be improved.

Hope the sequel comes with a higher difficulty, or a guides off feature to make us veterans work for our rewards. Also hello to you two in the credits.

I like escape room games.
The graphics are exquisitely implemented and consist of various puzzles without repetitive elements. Most puzzles can be solved with a little imagination and a close look around them. If there is anything you still miss, you can solve it with a hints of indirect suggestion from a pleasant assistant robot.
I'm still happily playing immersed. Merci Lionel!

Edited:
I completed this in about 6 or 7 hour play. Please show us the next part quickly.

developer_response.body: Thanks for such a good review. Glad you enjoyed the game and puzzles!

reviews.review_description:
10/10 lore
10/10 gameplay

As a huge fan of i expect you too die i saw this and thought "oh look a knock off" so i buy it and this game is so well made that i was standing around for 10 min's just saying wow.
This game is amazing and i would say underpriced for how amazing it is.
 PLEASE buy winston a new cpu for how funny and helpfull he was.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the 10/10 rating. It is an honor to be compared favorably to the IEYTD franchise. We appreciate your kind words regarding Winston and our pricing. Our goal was to provide an accessible yet high-quality VR adventure.

reviews.review_description:
Wow.. what a game!!
Sorry for the delayed review, but once I started your game.. I couldn’t stop playing it from beginning till end! … about 9 hours of awesome gameplay.. and for only 11.99!! 

This have it all.. great graphics and sound, humour, puzzles, good story, great physics… it’s a great game from beginning till end.

I’d even say that it’s probably one of the best games on the quest… there isn’t many that keep me playing till completion… loved it!!

The puzzles are challenging, a few I needed help with from my trusty, funny side kick… but most I was able to figure out myself.

I highly recommend this great game, especially if you like puzzlers or games with fun game and story. Easily worth the 5 stars.. the only issue I had is that the game ended lol.. I wanted more!!! 

Thank you devs! Can’t wait till the next one from you!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. We are thrilled you found the game's gameplay, graphics, and physics satisfying. Winston was designed to be a helpful companion throughout the story, and we are glad he assisted you well.

reviews.review_description:
One of the funnest games I played in a long time. The puzzles were just hard enough. Where they didn't make your brain hurt. The dialogue was hilarious.
Very enjoyable game.
Would give 5 but in chapter 2 you get spawned in the darknes

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear about the issue—it definitely sounds unusual. To try fixing it, check the game options and either reload the chapter or restart from your last checkpoint. This often resets the environment and resolves the glitch. If that doesn’t work, reach out to us on our Discord so we can investigate further: discord.gg/HDSQAnhYGU

We want to get you back to the game as soon as possible!

reviews.review_title: An escape room game with a lot puzzles
reviews.review_description:
Just finished the game. I loved every piece of it. A lot of puzzles. One a bit more difficult than the other.

Graphics are wow.

Minor glitches,  but that has no effect on your gameplay. 

I had about 6,5 hours of fun to complete this game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We are pleased that you enjoyed the variety of puzzles and the visual quality of the game. We have noted your comments regarding minor glitches and are continuing to refine the experience.

reviews.review_description: A very well-made game, at the right price point! Fantastic graphics, lovely flowing game, not overly hard puzzles, some were tricky, but, make it too hard, and people tend to give up. So I'd say we'll balanced. Definitely, will worth the purchase and will be getting the next installment. If you like escape rooms, why pay £45 for an hour, when for £11.99 you can play this for up to 10 hrs. Excellent 👍

I loved the plot, but you don't get to freely move around which ruins the immersion and makes it clunky if you have controllers with drift. Not to mention it looked like it had more open areas in the trailer, the result is very underwhelming. No tension

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback and we're glad you enjoyed the plot! Regarding movement, our game does feature free movement — it sounds like you might be experiencing some controller issues. We'd suggest checking your controller settings or recalibrating your device, as drift can definitely impact the experience.
All trailer scenes were captured from actual gameplay, and any additional story content was clearly labeled. The game has 7 chapters with quite a few rooms to discover, so we hope you'll give it another go — there might be more to explore than you'd expect!
As for the pacing and tension, we appreciate your perspective. This was an artistic choice we made based on conversations with our player community, and we know it won't resonate with everyone. Thank you for sharing your thoughts — it really helps us grow!

reviews.review_description: In level 2 the nothing but my hands would work or show i could hear my footsteps and see texts but thats it

developer_response.body:
I am so sorry to hear you're experiencing this issue! It definitely sounds like a very unusual problem.

To fix this, please check the game options for these two solutions:

Reload the chapter
Restart from your last checkpoint

In most cases, this should reset the environment and resolve the glitch. If neither of those options works, please don't hesitate to reach out to us directly on our Discord so we can look into it further: https://discord.gg/HDSQAnhYGU

We want to get you back to the game as soon as possible!

reviews.review_description: Fixer is one of those VR games that just clicks. The tools feel great to use, the missions are clever without being frustrating, and the whole vibe keeps you engaged. It’s easy to lose track of time because every task feels rewarding. If you like hands‑on, puzzle‑style VR games, this one’s absolutely worth playing.

The game was fun and moderately challenging, and the hint system was not a cheat sheet, my only complaint is the measuring tape and pickax being difficult to use. I can’t wait to see where the story goes next, and what your team has in store.
This game was amazing. All the mechanics were super fun. I really hope they make a second one. ￼

Excellent job Devs! This was really, really fun. The graphics were great, puzzles were just difficult enough for me. Had to use hints a few times. Lots of different rooms and story line kept moving . Very clever. Winston!! Can’t wait for the next one!
One issue I had in the circle room and the vault, I lost the hint system. Not a biggie, but you might wanna see if it’s something on your end. It came back after I left that room.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the positive review. Winston is reliable, but even drones have their moments. We’re looking into why the hint system cut out in the vault to make sure the next agent doesn't go in blind.

reviews.review_description: This game is very good. I love the puzzles and graphics, along with the story. My only qualm with it is the voice acting. There’s something about a lack of emotion sometimes, or that they all sound the same. Great game other than that.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review. We appreciate you, enjoyed the game and the voice acting is done by Chris McCullough (@GrigLager)

reviews.review_description: The game is phenomenal, and if there's a part two I will be getting it.But the only thing is, i'm not preordering it.Because I preordered this one and it didn't give me it.I tried to refill and it did not do it but other than that.The game is very good
it was super fun all of it was what is unique and it was really fun to play like the new gadgets were really cool
Insanely fun puzzler that scratches that I Expect You To Die itch perfectly.  Definitely one for your collection.
Played the demo and then I couldn’t wait for the release I have done played it and it is a great game well put together love the story and so much fun

developer_response.body: Thank you! Winston is incredibly proud someone appreciates his company. Thanks for a review!

reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed this game. Very well made

PROS: Lots of interesting puzzles + It has story + Medium difficult so you can go forward being stuck just a little time + Funny to play + Long game
CONS: some problems grabbing things (because of tools on the body)
If you liked Red Matter and I Expect You to Die, you will love this too. I am hoping they come out with another game like this one. ￼
Brilliant game , one of the best games I've played on meta quest , highly recommended if your into this game genre 👍🏼
I cant WAIT for the second one because it ended with a cliff hanger so i really hope there is a second one getting planned!😍
I love the game but at the end of koslovs office where you use the spanner to join the wires the pliers just won't work so I can't go any further 🙁

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for your review and sorry for the problem. Did you try to load the safe from the last puzzle you solved?  In this case if this doesn't help, please go to our Discord https://discord.com/invite/HDSQAnhYGU We will try to help you with that. You also have the option to restart the chapter.

reviews.review_description: Very good presentation and overall look

developer_response.body: Short and to the point – like a good grinder. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: This game is a masterpiece and I was hooked before opening the game but I will not forget we they did
